prose:
Method–provenance block for the reported HOMO–LUMO gap

• Property: HOMO–LUMO (frontier-orbital) gap, Koopmans‐type (εLUMO – εHOMO) = 6.6310857 eV  
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (exact four-center integrals, no density fitting)  
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied benzene.xyz (12 atoms) used as-is; single-point DFT on that fixed geometry (DFT//input xyz).  
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).  
• Charge 0; multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet).  
• Software: PySCF 2.x via chemkit *frontier-orbitals* skill.  
• Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 8 cycles; integrity.status = "ok", trustworthy = true; **no warnings reported**.  
• Output files: result JSON at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpbxkrr747/live.json`; live log was streamed to a companion `.out` file announced at run start and available for inspection.

Key numerical results (gas phase):
  − HOMO energy εHOMO = −7.0468329 eV  
  − LUMO energy εLUMO = −0.41574728 eV  
  − HOMO–LUMO gap Δε = 6.6310857 eV
